title: Day {number}
subtitle: The sun rises on another day in the arena.

events.text: {name} goes hunting.
{name} injures themselves.
{name} explores the arena.
{name} scavenges for food and water.
{name} sees smoke rising in the distance, but decides not to investigate.
{name} makes a wooden spear.
{name} discovers a cave.
{name} tries to sleep through the entire day.
{name} receives fresh food from an unknown sponsor.
{name} searches for a water source.
{name} discovers a river.
{name} questions their sanity.
{name} is pricked by thorns while picking berries.
{name} receives a hatchet from an unknown sponsor.
{name} searches for firewood.
{name} collects fruit from a tree.
{name} receives water from an unknown sponsor.
{name} receives medical supplies from an unknown sponsor.
{name} hunts for other tributes.
{name} patches up their wounds with strips of cloth.
{name} builds a crude shelter out of branches and leaves.
{name} sharpens their weapon on a rock.
{name} sits by a stream and contemplates their choices.
{name} climbs to higher ground to survey the arena.
{name} sets a series of crude snare traps.
{name} finds a cache of supplies hidden under a log.
{name} eats a questionable mushroom and spends the day sick but survives.
{name} practices throwing their weapon at trees.
{name} loses their footing on a muddy slope and tumbles down, bruised but alive.
{name} discovers a sponsor crate with a week's worth of rations.
{name} spends the day laughing to themselves. No one is sure why.
{name} runs away from {name2}.
{name} and {name2} hunt for other tributes.
{name} and {name2} split up to cover more ground.
{name} stalks {name2}.
{name} and {name2} work together for the day.
{name} and {name2} split up to search for resources.
{name} overhears {name2} talking in the distance.
{name} begs {name2} to kill them. {name2} refuses.
{name} tends to {name2}'s wounds.
{name} and {name2} share a meal they found in the woods.
{name} tail {name2} for hours without being noticed.
{name} and {name2} argue loudly over their next move.
{name} catches {name2} stealing from their pack, but lets it go.
{name} and {name2} agree to a temporary truce.
{name}, {name2}, and {name3} hunt for other tributes.
{name}, {name2}, and {name3} start hunting for other tributes.
{name} accidentally detonates a land mine while trying to arm it.
{name} steps on a land mine.
{name} eats a nightlock berry.
{name} dies from thirst.
{name} falls into a hidden pit trap and is impaled on the stakes below.
{name} is bitten by a venomous tracker jacker nest hidden in the undergrowth.
{name} drowns attempting to cross a raging river.
{name} collapses from infected wounds they couldn't treat.
{name} throws a knife into {name2}'s head.
{name} kills {name2} with their own weapon.
{name} overpowers {name2}, killing them.
{name} sets {name2} on fire with a molotov.
{name} shoots an arrow into {name2}'s head.
{name} stabs {name2} while their back is turned.
{name} kills {name2} as they try to run.
{name} pegs {name2} to a tree with a javelin.
{name} slits {name2}'s throat from behind.
{name} beats {name2} to death with a rock.
{name} lures {name2} into a trap they built overnight.
{name} decapitates {name2} with a machete.
{name} buries an axe in {name2}'s chest.
{name} snaps {name2}'s neck with their bare hands.
{name} drowns {name2} in a shallow creek.
{name} strangles {name2} with a length of wire.
{name} attempts to climb a tree, but falls on {name2}, killing them both.
{name} and {name2} work together to drown {name3}.
{name} and {name2} track down and kill {name3}.
{name} and {name2} ambush {name3} while they sleep.
{name} distracts {name3} while {name2} finishes them off.
{name} attacks {name2}, but {name3} protects them, killing {name}.
